Home / Services / Roof Inspections

Roof Inspections

Comprehensive roof inspections to identify potential problems before they escalate.

Regular roof inspections are essential for maintaining the health and longevity of your roofing system. DM Roofing & Construction offers thorough roof inspection services to homeowners and business owners throughout El Paso. Our experienced inspectors will carefully examine your roof for signs of damage, wear and tear, and potential problems that could lead to costly repairs down the road.

During a roof inspection, we'll check for cracked, missing, or damaged shingles, leaks, damaged flashing, clogged gutters, and other issues that could compromise the integrity of your roof. We'll provide you with a detailed report outlining our findings and recommendations for any necessary repairs or maintenance.

Whether you're buying or selling a home, or simply want to ensure that your roof is in good condition, a professional roof inspection from DM Roofing & Construction is a smart investment.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Visual inspection of the roof from the ground.
  2. 02 Step 2: Close-up inspection of the roof surface.
  3. 03 Step 3: Inspection of the attic for signs of leaks or damage.
  4. 04 Step 4: Detailed report with findings and recommendations.

Benefits

  • Identifies potential problems early on.
  • Helps prevent costly repairs.
  • Extends the lifespan of your roof.
  • Provides peace of mind.

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I have my roof inspected?

We recommend having your roof inspected at least once a year, and more frequently if you live in an area prone to severe weather.

What does a roof inspection cost?

The cost of a roof inspection depends on the size and complexity of the roof. Contact us for a free quote.

Will I receive a written report after the inspection?

Yes, we will provide you with a detailed written report outlining our findings and recommendations.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with roof inspections? Contact us today.
